scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.env.local')) { console.warn('WARNING: .env.local is missing! Your EXPO_PUBLIC_* variables will not be injected. Build might fail at runtime.'); } else { console.log('✅ .env.local found. API keys will be injected.'); }"
scripts.build:ios: npm run prebuild && eas build --platform ios --profile production --local
scripts.build:android: npm run prebuild && eas build --platform android --profile production --local
scripts.build:all: npm run prebuild && eas build --platform all --profile production
